  3. CRBN 1X Power Series

CRBN

CRBN 1X Power Series

Raw-carbon elongated power paddle for aggressive drives and added reach.

A strong option when you want power and spin from an elongated shape, but it rewards clean contact and confident swing mechanics.

TypePower
Shapeelongated
CorePolypropylene honeycomb
FaceRaw carbon fiber with power layer
Reference price$229.99
Price noteOfficial CRBN X Series pricing / verify variant
Level3.5, 4.0, 4.5, 5.0
TraitsPower, Spin, Reach
Used by / lineCRBN pro/team users vary by season

Control7.6
Spin8.9
Forgiveness7.7
